_metadata.purpose: Final per-city hard_floor_for_settlement values for Phase 2 consumption
_metadata.authority: PLAN.md §2.1 + operator rulings 2026-05-03 (asymmetric loss principle for Denver/Paris; preserve Lagos at 0.45 to honor σ_train=0.178 reality)

schema.null_value_meaning: no wu_icao_history data — DDD does not apply (uses tier-specific source)

decision_rationale.0.35_Jakarta: σ-aware analysis; high σ_train absorbs routine variance
decision_rationale.0.45_Lagos: Operator Ruling B 2026-05-03: σ_train=0.178 reflects physical infrastructure reality; effective trigger ≈ 0.27 catches only near-total sensor breakdown
decision_rationale.0.85_Denver_Paris: Operator Ruling A 2026-05-03: asymmetric loss principle — 3-hour outage catastrophic loss > 1.67% FP marginal cost; σ_train ≈ 0.06 small enough that 1-hour Poisson noise still absorbed at 0.85
decision_rationale.0.85_default: All cities with stable train coverage (train_min ≥ 0.857)
